title: Values, Expressions, Names, and Types · Language Clinic: Python Booleans None
summary: Build a transparent unit and budget calculator whose intermediate values can be inspected and tested. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python booleans none increment in an inspectable unit and budget calculator. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use Boolean values and None as distinct domain states instead of ambiguous numeric or text sentinels.
Use integers, floating-point values, decimal-sensitive decisions, arithmetic precedence, and division operators accurately.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
